summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Corgi 3-12 Month T-Bill ETF (CBIL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE US Treasury Bill 3-12 Months index. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of US Treasury bills with maturities between 3 and 12 months. CBIL was launched on Jun 4, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
infoTable: FTSE US Treasury Bill 3-12 Months Index
